name: Snigdha
overview: Snigdha" is a recent Bengali web series (2025) available on platforms like Hoichoi and JioHotstar, starring Rajnandini Paul as a renowned chef who loses her senses and must reinvent her culinary career, featuring other actors like Rajdeep Gupta, focusing on drama and food

trailers.title: Official Trailer- Snigdha (স্নিগ্ধা)| Rajnandini | Lakme | MPJ | India Gate | 30 Jan | hoichoi minis
